title: New Wallet Created
message: Wallet "New Nest Wallet" successfully created and secured with your PIN.

title: System Credit
message: Admin has minted and deposited 100 mUSD to your wallet.

title: System Debit
message: Admin has deducted 10 mUSD from your wallet balance.

title: Account Frozen
message: Your cryptocurrency wallet has been administratively frozen. Please contact customer support immediately.

title: Account Restored
message: Your cryptocurrency wallet has been restored to active status.
